allow: PowerShell(try { $conn = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient\("localhost", 5432\); $conn.Close\(\); "PostgreSQL is reachable on port 5432" } catch { "PostgreSQL NOT reachable on port 5432: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
PowerShell($pgBin = "C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\17\\bin"; if \(Test-Path $pgBin\) { & "$pgBin\\pg_isready.exe" 2>&1 } else { "pg bin not found at $pgBin" })

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; "Killed")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('ACCESS:', d['access'][:40]+'...'\); print\('REFRESH:', d['refresh'][:40]+'...'\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Total workouts: {d[\\"count\\"]}'\); [print\(f'  - {w[\\"name\\"]} on {w[\\"workout_date\\"]} \({w[\\"exercise_count\\"]} exercises, {w[\\"set_count\\"]} sets\)'\) for w in d['results'][:3]]")
